title: Open VSX publish on main
description:
Closed **2026-04-22** on superrepo [`f777b79`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f777b79) (tag **v0.1.0**).

**editor-extension** deliverable: bundled LSP default, Open VSX workflow scaffold → version derivation → namespace bootstrap → authenticated submodule checkout → VSCE icon fix → publish retries. CI must publish the VS Code extension from `main` without manual Open VSX steps.
